title: runtime-env-contract
description: Canonical runtime environment precedence contract shared across Stacker and downstream consumers.
_notes: Rendered runtime env payloads and inspection outputs must use these exact layer names and precedence values.
Clients must treat higher precedence layers as authoritative when the same key exists in multiple layers.
Inspection/help surfaces should expose the shared contract version and order instead of rewording the precedence rules independently.

layers.name: base
layers.description: App env and local authoring inputs provide the base runtime layer.

layers.name: server
layers.description: Server-scope secrets overlay the base layer when the target opts in.

layers.name: service
layers.appliesWhen: When remote service secrets exist for the selected service/app target
layers.description: Service-scope secrets override lower layers for the selected target.

layers.name: compose
layers.appliesWhen: When the compose service defines environment: keys
layers.description: Compose environment keys win over env_file-derived layers at runtime.
